name: Delek Drilling - Limited Partnership
summary: Delek Drilling - Limited Partnership engages in the exploration, development, production, and sale of petroleum, natural gas, and condensate in Israel and Cyprus. It serves private power plants and various industrial enterprises. Delek Drilling Management (1993) Ltd. serves as the general partner of the company. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Herzliya, Israel. Delek Drilling - Limited Partnership is a subsidiary of Delek Energy Systems Ltd.
